refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime statistics over the evaluation period using telemetry data to verify availability meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use link health monitoring and predictive failure detection algorithms.
DP3: Provide real-time telemetry reporting of link status.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover control
Telemetry reporting dependent on link status data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the sub-FRs with manageable coupling; redundancy and failover are core to availability.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased complexity leading to potential new failure modes.
Assumes failover mechanisms are fast enough to meet availability targets.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding predictive failure detection (DP2) in future refinement to further reduce downtime.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded systems responsible for network link hardware and failover control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Reports link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical network interfaces supporting redundant links and failover.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but limited direct control over physical link redundancy.
Primary containment of link hardware and failover logic; minimal diffusion.
Uses link but does not control redundancy mechanisms.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Placing link redundancy and failover control within the Vehicle module centralizes responsibility and minimizes diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in Vehicle module may increase integration risk.
Dependency on physical hardware availability and maintenance.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate if some monitoring functions should be delegated to Teleoperation for improved modularity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Failover logic tightly coupled with Vehicle hardware may complicate software updates.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment with low diffusion, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Telemetry interface enables effective verification of link availability from Vehicle to NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Vehicle module.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding predictive failure detection DP in next refinement.
Assess delegation of monitoring to Teleoperation module to reduce Vehicle complexity.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, incorporating predictive failure detection and clarifying monitoring responsibilities will improve robustness and modularity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

revise.why: To include predictive failure detection and improve failover responsiveness.

open_risks: Potential integration challenges with failover logic.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating link availability ≥ 0.999 over evaluation period.
